entities.name: THARAKA NITHI SUBCOUNTY
entities.description: A subcounty in Kenya where the nutrition intervention study was conducted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the study took place

entities.name: PHOTOVOICE
entities.description: A creative participatory learning tool used to build nutrition awareness, influence behavior change, and measure dietary intake

entities.name: SMART FOOD BRANDING
entities.description: A branded approach used in nutrition awareness drives to impart messages and enthusiasm for learning about nutrition

entities.name: ONE-ON-ONE DISCUSSION
entities.description: A method involving nutritionists to evaluate diets and improve participants' realization of consumption

entities.name: BEHAVIOR CHANGE
entities.description: The modification of dietary habits resulting from nutrition interventions and awareness

entities.name: DIETARY INTAKE
entities.description: The consumption of food and nutrients, measured through photovoice and nutritionist discussions

entities.name: NUTRITION AWARENESS
entities.description: The state of being informed about nutrition, built through photovoice and branded drives

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY SCORES
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the variety of foods consumed by households and women

entities.name: NUTRIENT INTAKE
entities.description: The measurement of specific nutrients consumed, including calories, protein, calcium, iron, and zinc

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A macronutrient measured in the dietary intake analysis

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A micronutrient measured in the dietary intake analysis

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient measured in the dietary intake analysis

entities.name: ZINC
